fixture: 056_select_planner_limits_a

statement 1:
  sql:
    CREATE TABLE widgets (id INTEGER NOT NULL)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 0

statement 2:
  sql:
    SELECT DISTINCT id FROM widgets
  result:
    error
    diagnostics:
      [0] ERROR [SQLSTATE 0A000] at 1:1 (offset 0): DISTINCT queries are not supported in Phase 1 planner

statement 3:
  sql:
    SELECT id FROM widgets GROUP BY id
  result:
    error
    diagnostics:
      [0] ERROR [SQLSTATE 0A000] at 1:1 (offset 0): GROUP BY queries are not supported in Phase 1 planner

statement 4:
  sql:
    SELECT id FROM widgets HAVING id > 0
  result:
    error
    diagnostics:
      [0] ERROR [SQLSTATE 0A000] at 1:1 (offset 0): HAVING queries are not supported in Phase 1 planner

statement 5:
  sql:
    SELECT id FROM widgets ORDER BY id
  result:
    error
    diagnostics:
      [0] ERROR [SQLSTATE 0A000] at 1:1 (offset 0): ORDER BY queries are not supported in Phase 1 planner
